responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete Enterprise Finalization to close remaining gaps from 84/100 certification and achieve 🏆 ENTERPRISE READY classification

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors: `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- Android/iOS QA status is PENDING (not BLOCKED) — requires physical device validation
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- EAS credentials NOT available — building APK locally with Gradle instead
- NEVER ask user for credentials — find them in the project or work around the blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports or responses — redact all tokens/keys
- Every PASS must include production evidence; every FAIL must include exact root cause
- Only mark PRODUCTION READY if every critical production module has been verified
- Do not modify working backend modules unless verification proves a regression
- Load test safety: stop at 5% error rate, use synthetic accounts, no destructive prod tests
- Do not classify IVX as Enterprise Ready until every requirement has been measured, verified and supported by production evidence

## Progress
### Done
- **ALL BACKEND BLOCKERS RESOLVED** — Migration: 179/179 statements, 0 errors. 56 tables created, RLS enabled, RLS recursion fixed
- **BLOCKER 1–5 + 9: ALL PASS** — Auth routes 401/403, chat RLS 200, 56/56 tables, push_tokens 200, SHA sync `d4cbfc2eca18`
- **TASK 1: ANDROID APK BUILD — COMPLETE** — Gradle `assembleRelease` BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 2m 2s, 424 tasks
  - Filename: `ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build8.apk`, Version: 1.4.3 (versionCode=8), Package: `com.ivxholdings.app`
  - SHA-256: `0301ecc519069bb515f5c00f7506d18dd4396ecd582bb19b2b2cd81d6a22e6bc`
  - Size: 82,813,086 bytes (~79 MB), build date 2026-07-14T18:15:40Z
  - APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build8.apk` and `/home/user/rork-app/expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
- **TASK 2: REALTIME VALIDATION — PASS** — 10/10 WebSocket tests pass
- **TASK 3: iOS STATIC ANALYSIS — PASS** — 38 Swift files, zero deprecated APIs, `DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=""` (needs Apple Team ID)
- **TASK 4: PRODUCTION VERIFICATION — PASS** — `/health`=200 (healthy, 77 routes), 18/18 Supabase tables, 10/10 auth routes 401
- **RC-1 REPORT PRODUCED** — `docs/IVX-RC1-FINAL-RELEASE-REPORT.md` — Status: READY FOR OWNER VALIDATION
- **ENTERPRISE PHASES 1–10 COMPLETE** — Score 84/100, 🟠 MEDIUM PRODUCTION (previous certification)
- **ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION PHASE 1: INFRASTRUCTURE VERIFIED** — `render.yaml` confirmed with autoscaling (1–3 instances), Redis, worker, staging, HA DB. Production API healthy (200, 117ms, commit d4cbfc2e, boot 2026-07-14T17:14:57Z)
- **ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION PHASE 2: LOAD TESTS 2000/5000 — COMPLETED WITH REAL DATA**
  - Burst 100: PASS | rps=272.7, p50=250.6ms, p95=359.7ms, 0% errors
  - Burst 500: PASS | rps=218.1, p50=1356.4ms, p95=2152.0ms, 0% errors
  - Burst 1000: PASS | rps=199.9, p50=3052.8ms, p95=4803.6ms, 0% errors
  - Burst 2000: PASS | rps=270.8, p50=3119.2ms, p95=6570.8ms, 0% errors
  - Burst 5000: **FAIL** | rps=526.7, 60% errors (timeouts at 20s) — needs multi-instance + Redis
  - Auth 500: PASS | rps=263.5, p95=1678.7ms, 0% errors
  - Auth 1000: PASS | rps=270.9, p95=3287.7ms, 0% errors
  - Auth 2000: **FAIL** | rps=293.8, p95=6266.0ms, 9.65% errors
  - Recovery: HEALTHY (28.4ms)
  - Results: `/tmp/ivx_burst_results.json`, script: `/tmp/ivx_burst.py`
- **ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION PHASE 3: SOAK TEST — COMPLETED**
  - 5 rounds × 200 concurrent × 8s = ~40s sustained load, 10,998 total requests, 0 errors
  - p50 drift: 85.1ms (STABLE), p95 drift: 889.7ms (STABLE), RPS drift: 16.8% (STABLE)
  - Server restarted: FALSE. Memory leak: NONE. Connection leak: NONE. Overall: PASS
  - Results: `/tmp/ivx_soak_results.json`, script: `/tmp/ivx_soak.py`
  - Note: This is a rapid soak (40s), NOT the required 4-hour soak test
- **ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION PHASE 4: CHAT OPTIMIZATION — COMPLETED**
  - `backend/chat-storage.ts` modified: Batched async persistence (FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS=2000) replacing per-message sync `writeFileSync` that blocked event loop at scale. Added `scheduleFlush()`/`flushNow()` methods, `close()` now flushes pending writes
  - `backend/express-chat-server.ts` modified:
    - MAX_CONNECTIONS=5000 with connection limit guard and disconnect tracking
    - Socket.IO tuning: maxHttpBufferSize=1MB, pingInterval=10s, pingTimeout=30s, serveClient=false, transports=['websocket','polling']
    - Message dedup ring buffer (DEDUP_TTL_MS=30s, DEDUP_MAX=10,000) with `checkDedup()` function
    - Message ordering via `roomSequence` Map with `nextSequence()` — seq attached to each broadcast
    - Reconnect support via `room:rejoin` event with message replay (sends missed messages after lastSeq)
    - Reduced log verbosity (every 100th connection, every 50th message)
  - Chat load test POST-FIX results:
    - Chat fetch 500: PASS | rps=89.0, p50=3501.0ms, p95=5228.3ms, 0% errors
    - Chat fetch 1000: **PASS | rps=149.3, p50=3676.5ms, p95=6410.2ms, 0% errors** (was 15.22% errors before fix!)
    - Chat send 100: PASS | rps=58.9, p50=90.8ms, p95=1661.2ms, 0% errors
    - Chat send 250: PASS | rps=279.0, p50=365.8ms, p95=825.7ms, 0% errors
    - Results: `/tmp/ivx_chat_lt_results.json`
- **ENTERPRISE FINALIZATION PHASE 6: MFA — COMPLETED**
  - Owner TOTP factor enrolled and verified via Supabase Auth API
  - Factor ID: `8c947a3f-055f-44f1-993e-aa482581897e`, type: totp, status: verified
  - Friendly name: IVX-Owner-MFA, User ID: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`
  - MFA enrollment flow: create factor → create challenge → verify with TOTP code → status=active
  - AAL: aal1 (password auth), factors count: 1 (verified)
  - `backend/services/ivx-enterprise-security.ts` updated: `ownerMfaEnrolled: true` with factor reference
- **ENTERPRISE PHASES 1–10 (PREVIOUS)** — All complete as documented in `docs/IVX-ENTERPRISE-CERTIFICATION.md`
- **WATCHMAN BYPASS SOLVED** — Fake watchman Python shim at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` returns valid JSON for all subcommands

### In Progress
- Enterprise Finalization final report — producing updated certification with new measured evidence

### Blocked
- **5000 concurrent user test: FAIL** — 60% timeout rate. Needs deployed multi-instance + Redis infrastructure (standard plan on Render). Code changes not yet deployed to production.
- **Auth at 2000: FAIL** — 9.65% error rate. Needs infrastructure scaling.
- **4-hour soak test** — NOT COMPLETED. Only ran rapid 5-round soak (40s). Full 4-hour test requires background process on server or extended execution environment.
- **Android device QA** — PENDING: No physical device/emulator in sandbox. Owner must install APK on real device and test login, feed, chat, media upload, notifications, AI, logout/login persistence
- **iOS device QA** — PENDING: No Xcode/physical device in sandbox. Owner must set `DEVELOPMENT_TEAM`, build in Xcode, test on iPhone
- **Enterprise routes not deployed** — `/api/ivx/enterprise/*` endpoints return 404 on production (commit d4cbfc2e doesn't include them). Code exists locally in `backend/hono.ts` and `backend/api/ivx-enterprise.ts` but not deployed to Render.
- **Database restore test** — PENDING:
